Backpack.description: Holds all the gear you can carry. Don't lose it.
Backpack.name: Backpack

Bottle.description: Glass containers that hold one draught of liquid.
Bottle.name: Bottle

Caltrops.description: Tiny, triangle-shaped iron spikes. Living creatures who step on caltrops take 1 damage and can only move at half speed for 10 rounds.
Caltrops.name: Caltrops

Crawling Kit.description:
A crawling kit costs 7 gp. It uses 7 gear slots and contains the following items.

  • @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.gear.oSnfz4qcWlUL6cDZ]{Backpack}

  • @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.gear.ERprfuTIFRFEix9G]{Flint and Steel}

  • 2x @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.gear.z3xc7HGysC4ZCU8e]{Torch}

  • @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.gear.EPndk3DPOEOSvbga]{Iron Spikes}

  • @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.gear.GX6OmWQiE7MzTmjX]{Rations}

  • @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.gear.fqsLWV46NWH0L53l]{Grappling Hook}

  • @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.gear.6ZRwVHFlh5QiyZWC]{Rope, 60'}
Crawling Kit.name: Crawling Kit

Crowbar.description: Grants advantage on checks to pry open stuck objects.
Crowbar.name: Crowbar

Curative.description:
Benefit. The imbiber of this herb regains hit points based on its level.

LV 1-3: [[/r 1d6]] hit points.

LV 4-6: [[/r 2d8]] hit points.

LV 7-9: [[/r 3d10]] hit points.

LV 10+: [[/r 4d12]] hit points.
Curative.name: Curative

EPndk3DPOEOSvbga.description:
Strong spikes. Each has a hole for threading

rope. Can be hammered in with weapons or other iron spikes.
EPndk3DPOEOSvbga.name: Iron Spikes

Flask.description: Glass containers that hold one draught of liquid.
Flask.name: Flask

Flint and Steel.description: A small fire starter. With it, routine attempts to light a fire always succeed.
Flint and Steel.name: Flint and Steel

Foebane.description: ADV on attacks and damage against one creature type you choose for [[/r 1d6]] rounds
Foebane.name: Foebane

Grappling Hook.description: A rope anchor with three, curved tines.
Grappling Hook.name: Grappling Hook

Handaxe.description:
Finesse (F). You can use your Strength or Dexterity when attacking with this weapon.

Thrown (Th). You can throw this weapon to make a ranged attack with it using Strength.
Handaxe.name: Handaxe

krielHVQxel7Jjtm.description:
Strong spikes. Each has a hole for threading

rope. Can be hammered in with weapons or other iron spikes.
krielHVQxel7Jjtm.name: Iron Spikes

Lantern.description: Casts light up to a double near distance (see Light, pg. 46). Requires oil. Has a shutter to hide the light.
Lantern.name: Lantern

Light Spell.description: Dummy item that acts like a light source cast by the @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spells.N4v17mtxJlVBbgpn]{Light} spell.
Light Spell.name: Light Spell

Light Spell (Double Range).description: Dummy item that acts like a light source cast by the double range @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spells.N4v17mtxJlVBbgpn]{Light} spell.
Light Spell (Double Range).name: Light Spell (Double Range)

Light Spell (Double Time).description: Dummy item that acts like a light source cast by the @UUID[Compendium.shadowdark.spells.N4v17mtxJlVBbgpn]{Light} spell.
Light Spell (Double Time).name: Light Spell (Double Time)

Oil, flask.description: Fuels a lantern for one hour of real time. One flask covers a close area and burns for 4 rounds, dealing 1d4 damage each round.
Oil, flask.name: Oil, flask

Rations.description: One day of food and water supply for one person.
Rations.name: Rations

Spear-thrower.description: When used to throw a spear, increase the spear's range to far.
Spear-thrower.name: Spear-thrower

Thieves' Tools.description: ADV on checks to climb, sneak, hide, apply disguises, find and disable traps, and perform delicate tasks.
Thieves' Tools.name: Thieves' Tools

Torch.description: Sheds light to a near distance (see Light Sources, pg. 46). Burns for one hour of real time.
Torch.name: Torch

Whip.description:
Type: Melee or Ranged.

Range: Close or Near

Finesse (F). You may use your STR or DEX when attacking with this weapon.

Lash (La). When you make a ranged attack with this weapon, it does not leave your grasp.
Whip.name: Whip
